violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in storage area and fanguards in walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The walls behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (speedracks) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

The floors underneath equipment, pallets, shelves (in walk-in cooler) and crates area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area are constructed of acoustic composite tiles. This material is not durable. Materials for ceiling surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items and/or litter were observed in the non-functional walk-in cooler and exterior area back area (inorganic material such as leaf litter and overgrown weeds). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024
